name: Scroll of Titan Summoning (Kraken)
description:
When you take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to read this scroll, a {@creature Kraken|XMM} appears in an unoccupied space in water that you can see within 1 mile of yourself. A {@creature kraken|XMM} requires a body of water large enough to contain it, or the summoning fails and the scroll is wasted
The {@creature Kraken|XMM} is {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} toward all other creatures and disappears when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. If the {@creature Kraken|XMM}
